name: XAU_AsiaLondon_RangeBreak_M5
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, the London session (07:00-10:00 UTC) frequently expands the Asia-session (00:00-06:00 UTC) range; a displacement breakout of that range yields a trend day.

entry_rules.long: during london session AND first breakout of day AND close > asia_high + 0.5*ATR AND candle_body >= 1.2*ATR
entry_rules.short: during london session AND first breakout of day AND close < asia_low - 0.5*ATR AND candle_body >= 1.2*ATR

exit_rules.sl: 1.2 * ATR(14) from entry (beyond opposite side of asia range)

regime_filter.rationale: require at least weak directional tendency

diversification_notes: Breakout family, inspired by LVC scout card.
